info.title: OpcSharp.Tool
info.description: CLI tool for exploring and diagnosing OPC UA servers using OpcSharp

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: OpcSharp CLI — explore and diagnose OPC UA servers

commands.name: init
commands.description: Generate a C# code snippet to set up an OpcSharp client

commands.name: discover
commands.description: Discover available endpoints on an OPC UA server

commands.name: browse
commands.description: Browse the OPC UA server address space

commands.name: read
commands.description: Read values from OPC UA nodes

arguments.name: nodeIds
arguments.description: Node IDs to read (e.g., i=2258 ns=2;s=Temp)

commands.name: check
commands.description: Run step-by-step connectivity check against an OPC UA server
